result.stdout:
[2026-03-30 12:54:14.611] [Debug] [MainAsync] xyDocGen — generate documentation from C# source files

Usage:
  xydocgen --root <path> --out <folder> --format <md|html|pdf|json> [options]

Examples:
  xydocgen --root src --out docs --format md,html,pdf --index --tree
  xydocgen --root src --out docs --format md --show-index
  xydocgen --root src --out docs --format pdf --private

Options:
  --help                                         Show this help and exit
  --info                                         Show current configuration and README.md
  --root <path>                              Source root (default: current project dir)
  --out <path>                               Base output directory (overrides --folder)
  --folder <name>                          Default: 'docs'
  --subfolder <a;b;c>                     Optional; per-format subfolders (1:1 with formats)
  --format <md|html|pdf|json>     Default: 'pdf,md,html,json' (supports multiple, comma/semicolon separated)
  --exclude <a;b;c>                        Additional directories to exclude
  --private                                    Exclude non-public members from documentation
  --index                                       Build namespace index (INDEX.md)
  --tree                                        Build project structure (PROJECT-STRUCTURE.md)
  --show-only                                       Print documentation to console (no files written)
  --show-index                              Print namespace index to console only
  --show-tree                               Print project tree to console only

Notes:
- You can specify multiple formats: --format md,html,pdf
- '--show-*' options suppress file output and print directly to console.
